texto: Love? Love…what is love? These emotions… are to confusing This pain… won't go away That kiss you gave me… That's what stole me away~omg i wrote this 4 years ago... XPi found it in a old post i made on a different site
explicacao: Pergunta retórica de Leticia Sanchez me que provoca vínculos afetivos e cuidado mútuo. Ao questionar “Love? Love…what is love? These emotions… are to confusing This pain… won't go away That kiss you …”, o texto convida o leitor a revisar crenças sobre amor, kiss, love, com foco em love.
